name: radio-group
description: A token-styled group of native <input type=radio> in a fieldset/legend. The shared name gives single-selection, roving arrow-key focus and the radiogroup role for free; binds via l:model on each radio. Server-first replacement for the Lit island. Ships the radio-group/option child partial.
docs: Copies the radio-group partial (+ its radio-group/option child) to your JTE root at lievit/radio-group.jte, reached as @template.lievit.radio-group(name=..., options=...). Native radios sharing `name` POST the selected value JS-off; bind to a wire field with `model`. The source is yours: edit freely.
